PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?company ?companyLabel(xsd:decimal(?revenue) AS ?revenueAmount) WHERE {
  ?company wdt:P31 / wdt:P279 * wd:Q43229 .
  ?company p:P2139 ?statement .
  ?statement ps:P2139 ?revenue .
  ?statement pq:P585 ?date .
  FILTER(regex(STR(?date) , "2023"))
  .
  FILTER(isNumeric(?revenue))
  .
  FILTER(xsd:decimal(?revenue) < 1000000000000)
  .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?company rdfs:label ?companyLabel .
    FILTER(LANG(?companyLabel) = "en")
  }
}
ORDER BY DESC(?revenueAmount)
LIMIT 1
